raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Babeles Kehninsch
Darrija Mataniju (Jojakina)
Brahneeku par Kehninu winna
Weetâ/ un dewe winnam to
Wahrdu Zidekijus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zidekijus bija dtwïdefinitis
un weenu Gaddu wezz/ kad tas
pahr Kehnina tappe/ un waldt-
ja weenpadefurts Gaddus Jeru-
saleme/ un winna Mahtei bija
Amitala Wahra Jeremijasa
Meita no Libnas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch darrija/ kas
tam KUNGAM re patieke/ it-
tin ta patt ka Jojakims bij
darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas notïke ta zaur
ta KUNGA Dusinibe prett Je-
rusalemi un Juhdu/ teekams
wiꞥsch tohs no tawa Waiga bij
atimettis/ un Zidekijus atkahpe
no ta Babeles Kehnina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXV. Nodalla.
NebukadNezars uskreinn un fadefina to
Pilssahtu Jerusalemi: 1/4/9. Wedd Zide-
kiju Zeetuma: 5. Leek tam pascham tahs Az-
zis isduirt: 7. Un aiswedd winnu ar teem
Kaudim us Babeli: 18. Gedalijus tohp
pahr teem atlifkuscheem kaudim eezelts: 22.
Ro Ifmaeis nokauj: 23. Jojakins tohp no
fawa Zeetuma ispestihts: 27.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N tas notïkahs dewi-
ta Gadda winna Wal-
difchanas definita Meh-
nesi/ definita Mehnes Deena/
nahze NebukadNezars tas Ba-
beles Kehninsch ar wiꞥfu fawu
Karra-Spehku prett Jerusalemi/
un apmette Lehgeri prett winnu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un ustaisija weenu Walli ap-
kahrt winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta tappe tas Pilstahts
apstahts lihdst tam weenpadefmi-
tam Gaddam ta Kehnina Zide-
kijus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet dewitta (Deena) ta
(zettorta) Mehnes/ kad tas
Badg Pilssahta pahrwarreja/
un teem Semmes Laudim Mat-
sees wairs ne bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tappe Pilssahta ee-
lausts/ un wisft Karra-Wihri
behdse Nakti us to Zeltu no
Wahrtim starp teem divi Muh-
reem/ kas pee ta Kehnina Dahrs-
sa btja/(Bet tee Kaldeerti bija ap-
kahrt to Pilssahtu/) un tas Keh-
ninsch behdse us ta Klatjuma
Zeltu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet to Kaldeertu Spehks
dïnnahs tam Kehninam pakak/
un tecpanahze to Jerikusa Klaiju-
mös/ un wisfs winna Spehrs
tappe no winna izsaifihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee fagrahbe ta Kehni-
nu/ un wedde to pee to Babele-
Kehninu us Riblatu/ un tee net-
fe to Teesu pahr winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee nokawe Zidekijus
Dehluß preeksch winna Azzim/
un apstulboja Zidekijus Azzis/
un faistija to ar divi Warra
Schkehdehn/ un wedde to us
Babeli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un feptita Deena ta peek-
ta Mehnes (tas irr tas dewin-
padeefnitajs Gads ta Kehnina
NebukadNezara ta Babeleg
Kehnina/) nahze Nebusara-
dans
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
